task_completion.description: Open the draft bilingual NDA document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the 'bilingual_nda_draft.docx' document.

task_completion.description: Change the font of the entire document to Times New Roman.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The font dropdown in the word processor's toolbar shows 'Times New Roman' when text is selected, or the document text visually appears in the Times New Roman serif font.

task_completion.description: Format the first row titles ('MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT' and 'ACUERDO DE CONFIDENCIALIDAD MUTUA') as Centered, Bold, and 14pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main titles at the top of the document are aligned to the center, bolded, and visibly larger (14pt) than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Format all numbered section headings (e.g., '1. Confidential Information', '2. Obligations' and their Spanish equivalents) as Bold and 12pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The numbered headings throughout the document are bolded and slightly larger (12pt) than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Format the defined terms 'Confidential Information' and 'Información Confidencial' in the body text as Bold and Italic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Instances of the specific phrases 'Confidential Information' and 'Información Confidencial' within the paragraphs are both bolded and italicized.

task_completion.description: Right-align the paragraphs starting with 'Date:' and 'Fecha:' in the signature blocks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date:' and 'Fecha:' lines at the bottom of the document are aligned to the right margin.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted document as 'bilingual_nda_final.docx' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'bilingual_nda_final.docx' in the 'TextDocuments' folder, or the word processor title bar showing the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to format the document rather than a script or terminal command.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a word processor GUI (like LibreOffice Writer), not a terminal running python-docx scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually selected text and applied formatting using the application's toolbar or menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text being highlighted and formatting buttons (Bold, Italic, Center, Right-align, Font size/family dropdowns) being clicked.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's Save/Save As functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog box is visible, or the application menu is used to save the file, rather than a terminal command moving or renaming files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/bilingual_nda_final.docx'. The required font family for the entire document is 'Times New Roman'.
